name: webrobot-browser-extensions
description: WebRobot Pipeline Designer browser extension (Chrome/Edge + Firefox, Manifest V3). Port of the VitePress demo app (DemoApp.vue): on-page selector picker + pipeline designer + run.

scripts.build:chrome: rm -rf dist/chrome && mkdir -p dist/chrome && cp -r src icons dist/chrome/ 2>/dev/null; cp manifest.chrome.json dist/chrome/manifest.json
scripts.build:firefox: rm -rf dist/firefox && mkdir -p dist/firefox && cp -r src icons dist/firefox/ 2>/dev/null; cp manifest.firefox.json dist/firefox/manifest.json
scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.zip:chrome: npm run build:chrome && cd dist/chrome && zip -qr ../webrobot-pipeline-designer-chrome.zip .
scripts.zip:firefox: npm run build:firefox && cd dist/firefox && zip -qr ../webrobot-pipeline-designer-firefox.zip .
